title: AbdulThings
description: The mod adds things with a strange look and properties.
body:
**The mod adds things with a strange look and properties.
Such as:**

PhantomGun - kills all living things, but if you miss, it will clear your inventory

GigaHoe - just a very long hoe, turns any block into plowing

Inverted Fugue Diamond Fish - Gives you nausea and regeneration

Fishing Pickaxe - Gives you 1 fish when breaking blocks

Reversed Sword - Damages you when you hold it

Dead sheep - the best fuel in the game

Broad Trident - Powerful Weapon (40dmg)

Acacia Trapdoor - an item that can be crafted from everything (Useless as aqua))

Inventory - simple multitool.

Crayfish and coins - an amulet that gives strength when in inventory

Watermelon cake - replenishes saturation bar when broken

Shulker - gives levitation if in hand

Purple diamond and Birch texture - Right clicking replaces mobs with diamonds
Aquarium - covers the entire screen

Strider with a shovel - Fire machine gun

Book with feather - Causes rain by pressing RMB

Dye End Portal - RMB takes you to the end

Explosive Fish - еxplodes when eaten

e+18 Pigs - Inefficient multitool

Elytra Bucket - Breaks an object in the hands of a mob

Boots xp - Gain 1 experience per tick if worn on feet

Minecart helmet - Cosmetic Item

- - -

The mod was created for people who would like to see those items from the meme :)

- - -

**_Since the mod is in beta, GUI changes are not yet available._**
